title: cyclamen europaeum subsp. repandum
intro: Cyclamen europaeum subsp. repandum, also known as the wood cyclamen, is a sub-species of the cyclamen europaeum plant, which is a type of flowering perennial native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, fever, and rheumatism. The wood cyclamen is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and acting as a natural diuretic. In herbal preparations, the wood cyclamen is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
